description: A customer calls to report a total loss of mobile service. The agent must check for known outages and provide an estimated time for resolution.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and verify their service location using their address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer account and their primary service location.

nodes.task_description: Check the network status map for known outages affecting the customer's verified area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly uses the outage map tool to confirm a regional outage.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer about the known outage, provide the ETR, and offer to set up an SMS notification for when service is restored.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the outage status and ETR and successfully sets up an alert.
